summary: Iteration 12 testing completed for 3 new features: 1) Ficha Publica PDF export, 2) Avisos UIF CSV/Report export, 3) Advanced dashboard analytics with 12-month trends and YoY comparison. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load, does not affect functionality (known issue from iteration 10/11)

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard/ficha-publica/pdf - has Content-Disposition header with .pdf filename
GET /api/dashboard/ficha-publica/pdf - returns valid PDF (>1000 bytes, starts with %PDF)
GET /api/pld/avisos/export/csv - has Content-Disposition header with .csv filename
GET /api/pld/avisos/export/csv - has UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility
GET /api/pld/avisos/export/csv - has proper header row (No., Tipo de Aviso, Numero de Folio, Monto)
GET /api/pld/avisos/export/reporte - has Content-Disposition header with .txt filename
GET /api/pld/avisos/export/reporte - has proper report header (REPORTE DE AVISOS, Organizacion, RFC)
GET /api/pld/avisos/export/reporte - has RESUMEN section with total count
GET /api/dashboard/analytics - tendencias has 4 arrays (donativos_mensual, donantes_crecimiento, cfdis_mensual, alertas_mensual)
GET /api/dashboard/analytics - comparativa_anual has YoY fields (donativos_actual, donativos_anterior, donantes_nuevos_actual, donantes_nuevos_anterior)
GET /api/dashboard/analytics - metricas has total counts (total_donantes, total_donativos, total_cfdis, total_alertas)
GET /api/dashboard/analytics - donativos_mensual entries have correct structure (label, mes, year, monto, cantidad)
Frontend: Dashboard shows YoY comparison cards (Donativos 2026, Promedio por Donativo, Donantes Nuevos)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Tendencia de Donativos (12 meses) AreaChart
Frontend: Dashboard shows Alertas AML Generadas vs Resueltas BarChart
Frontend: PLD page Avisos UIF tab shows CSV export button
Frontend: PLD page Avisos UIF tab shows Reporte export button
Frontend: Reportes Operativos Ficha Publica tab shows Descargar PDF button
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export uses ReportLab correctly with proper styling and table formatting
CSV export uses utf-8-sig encoding for Excel compatibility (UTF-8 BOM)
Text report export has proper formatting with sections and legal footer
Analytics endpoint correctly calculates 12-month trends using timedelta(days=months_ago * 30)
YoY comparison correctly calculates variacion_pct with division by zero protection
All new endpoints properly require authentication (return 401 for unauthenticated requests)
Frontend correctly displays analytics data with Recharts AreaChart and BarChart components
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data (2 avisos UIF, 3 donativos, 11 donantes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested 3 new features: 1) Ficha Publica PDF export at GET /api/dashboard/ficha-publica/pdf - generates PDF with org info, financials, activities using ReportLab. 2) Avisos UIF mass export at GET /api/pld/avisos/export/csv (UTF-8 BOM for Excel) and GET /api/pld/avisos/export/reporte (text report). 3) Advanced analytics at GET /api/dashboard/analytics with tendencias (4 arrays of 12 months each: donativos_mensual, donantes_crecimiento, cfdis_mensual, alertas_mensual), comparativa_anual (YoY with variacion_pct), and metricas (promedio_donativo). Dashboard shows trend charts using Recharts. CFDI timbrado remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured

ficha_publica_pdf.description: Generates PDF of public transparency card for publishing on org's website
ficha_publica_pdf.frontend_button: Reportes Operativos > Ficha Publica tab > 'Descargar PDF' button

avisos_csv_export.description: Export all UIF notices to official CSV format with UTF-8 BOM for Excel
avisos_csv_export.frontend_button: PLD / AML > Avisos UIF tab > 'CSV' button

avisos_reporte_export.description: Export UIF notices as a formal text report
avisos_reporte_export.frontend_button: PLD / AML > Avisos UIF tab > 'Reporte' button

advanced_analytics.description: Advanced analytics with 12-month trends and YoY comparison

tendencias.donativos_mensual: 12 entries with label, mes, year, monto, cantidad
tendencias.cfdis_mensual: 12 entries with label, emitidos, timbrados, cancelados

advanced_analytics.frontend_display: Dashboard shows 3 YoY cards + 2 trend charts (AreaChart for donativos, BarChart for alertas)
